CREATE TABLE angles (angle_id INT PRIMARY KEY, angle_value FLOAT);
SELECT angle_id, angle_value, cot(angle_value) AS cot_value FROM angles;
SELECT angle_id, cot(angle_value) AS cot_value FROM angles WHERE angle_value > 0;
SELECT angle_id, cot(3.0 * angle_value) AS cot_transformed FROM angles;
SELECT a.angle_id, cot(a.angle_value) AS cot_value, b.angle_value FROM angles a JOIN angles b ON a.angle_id = b.angle_id WHERE a.angle_value > b.angle_value;
SELECT (SELECT cot(angle_value) FROM angles WHERE angle_id = 1) AS cot_zero, (SELECT cot(angle_value) FROM angles WHERE angle_id = 2) AS cot_pi;
SELECT cot(angle_value + 1) AS shifted_cot FROM angles WHERE angle_value BETWEEN 0 AND 16;
SELECT cot(angle_value) FROM angles WHERE angle_value IN (SELECT angle_value FROM angles WHERE angle_value < 0) UNION SELECT cot(2 * angle_value) FROM angles WHERE angle_value > 5;
